name: WOW Reversible Beach Towel Yellow - Sun Squad™: Cotton, Lightweight, Quick-Dry, Oeko-Tex Certified
description:
Feel great after a dip in the pool or playing in the waves at the beach with this WOW Reversible Beach Towel from Sun Squad™. Made with 100% terry cotton, this beach towel feels soft against your skin. Handy for spreading on the sand or over your chaise lounge while soaking up the sun, you can also wrap it around your waist after a swim or shower. Best of all, it's designed with a loop at the back for easy hanging from a hook or nail. Showcasing a reversible print with a solid yellow hue on the front and a pink reverse, this cotton beach towel makes the perfect accessory for your sunny activities.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
